Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: High strength Al–Li alloy development for laser powder bed fusion

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition from ingot development study; no Sc or Zr addition (control sample)

Process_Text.original: Casting using high purity aluminum (99.99%), Al-10Li, Al-50Cu master alloys; ingots sectioned into thin cylinders (30 mm diameter, 5 mm thickness); P800 grit polish; laser glazing with IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max), scanning velocities 400-800 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm, beam defocusing distance 0 mm
Process_Text.simplified: Arc melting and casting of Al-4Cu-1.25Li ingots; laser glazing as screening method for LPBF compatibility

Process_Info.Equipment: IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max)

Microstructure_Text.original: Cast region showed typical dendrite structure with white phases distributed along dendrite boundaries (Cu-containing intergranular phases). Laser glazing region: interdendritic phases nearly absent due to high cooling rate dissolving phases and freezing solutes in Al matrix. Only small amount of fine white phases (Al2Cu) left in laser glazing region.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Cast: dendritic structure with Cu-rich intergranular phases. Laser glazed: fine equiaxed grains, intergranular phases dissolved, fine Al2Cu particles remaining

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Laser glazing region; scanning velocity 400-600 mm/s
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Longitudinal section of laser glazed sample
Properties_Info.Note: Average equivalent circle diameter in laser glazing region; cracks present

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition from ingot development study; prepared with Al-2Sc-1Zr master alloy

Process_Text.original: Casting using high purity aluminum (99.99%), Al-10Li, Al-50Cu, Al-2Sc-1Zr (wt%) master alloys; ingots sectioned into thin cylinders (30 mm diameter, 5 mm thickness); P800 grit polish; laser glazing with IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max), scanning velocities 400-800 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm
Process_Text.simplified: Arc melting with Sc-Zr inoculation; laser glazing as LPBF screening method

Process_Info.Equipment: IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max)

Microstructure_Text.original: Cast region: fine equiaxed grains with polygonal Al3(Sc,Zr) phases inside grains and Cu-containing intergranular phases at boundaries. Laser glazing region: columnar grains preferentially advancing along normal direction of molten pool boundaries; fine equiaxed grains occasionally at molten pool boundaries; polygonal Al3(Sc,Zr) phases present.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Fine equiaxed grains in cast; columnar grains with Al3(Sc,Zr) precipitates in laser glazed region; intergranular Cu phases dissolved during glazing

Properties_Info.Note: Significant grain refinement compared to sample #1 (257.9 μm to 15.6 μm)

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition from ingot development study; intermediate Sc-Zr content

Process_Text.original: Casting using high purity aluminum (99.99%), Al-10Li, Al-50Cu, Al-2Sc-1Zr (wt%) master alloys; ingots sectioned into thin cylinders (30 mm diameter, 5 mm thickness); P800 grit polish; laser glazing with IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max), scanning velocities 400-800 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm
Process_Text.simplified: Arc melting with intermediate Sc-Zr inoculation; laser glazing for LPBF screening

Process_Info.Equipment: IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max)

Microstructure_Text.original: Cast region: fine equiaxed grains with polygonal Al3(Sc,Zr) phases. Laser glazing region: columnar grains with increased amount of equiaxed grains at boundaries compared to #2; fine polygonal Al3(Sc,Zr) phases present; intergranular Cu phases dissolved.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Fine equiaxed cast structure; refined columnar grains in laser glazed region with more equiaxed grains at boundaries

Properties_Info.Note: Further refinement from higher Sc-Zr content

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition; suggested inoculation for LPBF processing (along with #5)

Process_Text.original: Casting using high purity aluminum (99.99%), Al-10Li, Al-50Cu, Al-2Sc-1Zr (wt%) master alloys; ingots sectioned into thin cylinders; P800 grit polish; laser glazing with IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W), scanning velocities 400-800 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm
Process_Text.simplified: Arc melting with 0.8Sc-0.4Zr inoculation; laser glazing screening for LPBF

Process_Info.Equipment: IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max)

Microstructure_Text.original: Cast region: fine equiaxed grains. Laser glazing region: finer and shorter columnar grains; increased amount of equiaxed grains at molten pool boundaries; polygonal Al3(Sc,Zr) phases present.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Crack-free laser glazing region; bimodal grain structure with refined columnar grains

Properties_Info.Note: Grain refinement approaching minimum (~10 μm) for casting

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition; selected for LPBF powder production (optimized composition)

Process_Text.original: Casting using high purity aluminum (99.99%), Al-10Li, Al-50Cu, Al-2Sc-1Zr (wt%) master alloys; ingots sectioned into thin cylinders; P800 grit polish; laser glazing with IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W), scanning velocities 400-800 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm; converted to powder by inert gas atomization (Hunan Hengji Powder Technology)
Process_Text.simplified: Arc melting with maximum Sc-Zr inoculation; laser glazing screening; powder atomization for LPBF

Process_Info.Equipment: IPG YLR-500 fiber laser (500 W max); Hunan Hengji Powder Technology gas atomization system

Microstructure_Text.original: Cast region: fine equiaxed grains (18.2 μm) larger than #2-#4 due to exceeding grain refinement limit; polygonal Al3(Sc,Zr) phases clustered and coarsened. Laser glazing region: nearly fully equiaxed grains (1.4 μm); finest grain structure among all samples; crack-free.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Crack-free laser glazing with finest nearly equiaxed grains (1.4 μm); Al3(Sc,Zr) as heterogeneous nucleation sites for grain refinement

Properties_Info.Note: Finest grain structure among all laser glazing samples; order of magnitude finer than cast region

Composition_Info.Note: Measured composition of LPBF sample (as-fabricated); Li loss rate 9% from powder to LPBF sample; powder atomized by Hunan Hengji Powder Technology using inert gas atomization

Process_Text.original: Gas atomized powder (Hunan Hengji Powder Technology) with D50 ~30-50 μm particle size; LPBF processing on LiM-X260A LPBF machine (same laser/optical system as in-house LPBF); optimized parameters: laser power 300 W, scanning velocity 1200 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm, layer thickness 40 μm, hatch style rotation 90°; processing efficiency 4.8 mm³/s; cuboid samples 8×8×6 mm, tensile plates 84×5×11 mm per ASTM B557M-10
Process_Text.simplified: Novel Al-Cu-Li-Sc-Zr alloy specifically designed for LPBF; inert gas atomized powder; optimized LPBF parameters: 300 W, 1200 mm/s, 0.1 mm hatch, 40 μm layer, 90° rotation

Process_Info.Equipment: LiM-X260A LPBF machine; IPG YLR-500 fiber laser system

Microstructure_Text.original: Bimodal grain microstructure: fine equiaxed grains (0.6 μm average equivalent circle diameter) mainly at molten pool boundaries due to high number density of primary Al3(Sc,Zr) nucleation sites; fine columnar grains (2.5 μm average equivalent circle diameter) located inside molten pools related to low number density of nucleation sites and high temperature gradient. No cracks observed. Spherical pores (keyhole collapse) and irregular-shaped pores (inadequate inter-track/inter-layer bonding) present but low. T1 (Al2CuLi) phase not found in as-fabricated condition.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Bimodal microstructure: fine equiaxed grains at melt pool boundaries, fine columnar grains inside pools; Al3(Sc,Zr) precipitates as nucleation sites; no cracks; 99.9% relative density

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM B557M-10; 25 mm clip gauge extensometer
Properties_Info.Note: Highest yield strength among LPBF aluminum alloys in as-fabricated condition

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM B557M-10; 25 mm clip gauge extensometer
Properties_Info.Note: Highest UTS among LPBF aluminum alloys in as-fabricated condition

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM B557M-10; 25 mm clip gauge extensometer
Properties_Info.Note: Good ductility for high strength aluminum alloy; combination of high strength and good ductility achieved

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: EBSD analysis; equivalent circle diameter and width
Properties_Info.Note: Located inside molten pools; aligned along build direction
Located at molten pool boundaries; area fraction α = 0.75

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: ICP-OES comparison of powder and LPBF sample composition
Properties_Info.Note: Lower Li loss rate than LPBF 2195 (24%); attributed to lower molten pool temperature due to smaller laser energy density

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Calculated as scanning velocity × layer thickness × hatch spacing
Properties_Info.Note: 20 times higher processing efficiency than LPBF 2195
